data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims of Sable Offshore investors with losses exceeding $50,000 between May 19 - June 3.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $50,000 in Sable Offshore between May 19, 2025, and June 3, to reach out directly to him. If you find yourself in this situation, it is advisable to contact him to explore potential options for recourse.

data.title: Supply Chain Digital releases 100 Global Supply Chains Report, highlighting innovation, sustainability, and resilience worldwide.
data.description: London, September 23, 2025 - The latest annual ranking from Supply Chain Digital, a BizClik brand, showcases the leading organizations making strides in innovation, sustainability, and resilience within global supply networks. This comprehensive list highlights companies that are paving the way for progress in these key areas.

data.title: CAKE price up by 3.26%, aiming for $3.15 resistance. Currently at $2.82 with bullish momentum and high volume.
data.description: The cost of CAKE surges to $2.82 driven by bullish momentum indicators and high trading volume, challenging critical resistance levels. Technical analysis points towards ongoing potential for further upward movement.

data.title: FlexPatio Pergola in Colorado integrates smart tech and all-weather comfort for outdoor living. American backyard revolution.
data.description: In Englewood, Colorado on September 24, 2025, it was reported that there is a notable transformation occurring in American backyards. Rather than just seeking basic shade, homeowners are now opting for comprehensive outdoor living spaces that can be utilized throughout the year. This change is highlighted by recent statistics from the United States.

data.title: Cognision and SOMNOmedics partner to advance sleep biomarkers in pharmaceutical trials, boosting neurophysiological solutions in 2025.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, on September 24, 2025, Cognision, a prominent provider of high-performance neurophysiological biomarker solutions and services, revealed a new strategic alliance with SOMNOmedics AG. The latter is a leading global company specializing in cutting-edge sleep diagnostics technology. This partnership aims to enhance the capabilities of both companies by combining their expertise in neurophysiological biomarkers and sleep diagnostics, respectively. The announcement signifies a significant move for both organizations as they seek to leverage each other's strengths in this collaboration.

data.title: Investors with losses above $50,000 in KBR between May 6, 2025, and June 19, 2025, urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced losses surpassing $50,000 in KBR during the period from May 6, 2025, to June 19, 2025, to reach out to him for a discussion of available options. If your financial losses meet or exceed $50,000 in KBR within the specified timeframe and you wish to explore potential avenues for recourse, Wilson can provide assistance.

data.title: Mobile Gamma Cameras Market to reach $800M by 2033 with 7.3% CAGR growth, driven by demand for point-of-care imaging and nuclear medicine advancements.
data.description: The market for mobile gamma cameras is currently witnessing significant growth due to a surge in the need for point-of-care diagnostic imaging. This growth is further fueled by advancements in nuclear medicine and a growing number of chronic diseases that necessitate quick imaging solutions. The increasing demand for compact and portable designs is leading to an expansion in this market segment. As a result, the mobile gamma cameras market is experiencing strong momentum, with numbers indicating a substantial increase in sales and adoption rates.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Nutex Health investors with losses over $50,000 between Aug 8, 2024, and Aug 15, 2025. Contact James Wilson for options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses surpassing $50,000 in Nutex from August 8, 2024, to August 15, 2025, to reach out to him for a discussion on potential options.

data.title: Shared mobility market to grow at 8.5% CAGR between 2026-2033 due to urbanization, sustainability goals, and rising consumer demand.
data.description: The shared mobility market is experiencing significant growth due to factors such as urbanization, traffic congestion, and consumer preferences for affordable and sustainable transportation. Government efforts to promote environmentally friendly options and decrease carbon emissions are also contributing to this trend. This industry is projected to reach a value of $619 billion by 2026, showing the increasing popularity and importance of shared mobility services.

data.title: ONDO price falls to $0.94 with 0.45% drop as bears dominate. Support at $0.89 key amid possible downside momentum.
data.description: The price of ONDO has decreased by 0.45% to $0.94 amid growing bearish momentum. Technical analysis indicates the possibility of continued decline, with a crucial support level at $0.89.

data.title: Inventor from Idaho creates CELL SAFE accessory to prevent distracted driving. Allows phone accessibility while driving.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 24, 2025, an inventor from Hayden Lake, Idaho, shared the creation of CELL SAFE with a vision to eliminate risky handheld phone use and texting during driving. The innovative device, designed to prevent access to the phone while driving, aims to enhance road safety. This solution could potentially reduce the number of accidents caused by distracted driving, especially involving mobile phones. The inventor believed in the significance of addressing this issue and took action by creating a product that could make a difference. The impact of CELL SAFE could be profound, potentially saving numerous lives and preventing injuries on the roads.

data.title: Bybit, 2nd largest crypto exchange, boosts Mantle (MNT) capabilities. Upgrade aligns with Mantle x Bybit Roadmap.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on September 24, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally based on trading volume, announced a comprehensive enhancement of Mantle (MNT) capabilities throughout its platform. This development follows the earlier reveal of the Mantle x Bybit Roadmap. This upgrade signifies the fulfillment of the plan, showcasing the commitment to improving services for users.

data.title: Lessen launches Repair & Maintenance Benchmark Report for SFR industry with 680,000 work orders, $470 million spend.
data.description: Lessen, a leading tech-driven provider of outsourced property services, unveiled its first-ever Repair & Maintenance (R&M) Benchmark Report in the single-family rental (SFR) sector. This extensive study analyzed over 680,000 work orders and a total expenditure of $470 million throughout 2024. The report, offering operators a standardized dataset, serves as a crucial tool for measuring performance and trends in the industry.
